patch.value:
## Context

CONFIGURATION.md:
- Documents schema/types.json (custom types) and schema/statuses.json (custom statuses)
- Has no mention of schema/fields.json, RuntimeFieldDefinition, or custom field authoring

The fields system (src/core/schema/runtime-schema.ts:238-278 normalizeRuntimeFieldDefinition) supports:
- key, type (string/number/boolean/string_array), metadata_key, cli_flag, cli_aliases
- commands (which commands show the flag: create/update/list/search/context)
- required, required_on_create, allow_unset
- required_types (only required for certain item types)
- description (shown in --help)

docs/CONFIGURATION.md:71 does list schema.type_workflows[] with a JSON example. The same pattern should be followed for a fields.json example.

## Acceptance criteria

- CONFIGURATION.md adds a 'Custom Runtime Fields' section covering:
  - schema/fields.json file path and shape ({ "fields": [RuntimeFieldDefinition...] })
  - All RuntimeFieldDefinition properties with examples
  - One end-to-end example (add a 'component' string field on Task items)
  - Note on unknown_field_policy for governance
  - Note that pm schema add-field (once implemented) is the preferred CLI method
- COMMANDS.md schema section cross-references custom fields

## Evidence

- docs/CONFIGURATION.md (full file — no fields.json mention)
- src/core/schema/runtime-schema.ts:238-278 (RuntimeFieldDefinition shape)
- src/core/schema/runtime-schema.ts:28 (DEFAULT_RUNTIME_SCHEMA_FILE_PATHS.fields = 'schema/fields.json')
- docs/CONFIGURATION.md:71 (type_workflows example — style to follow)
Document schema/fields.json runtime custom field authoring in CONFIGURATION.md

CONFIGURATION.md has zero mention of schema/fields.json, RuntimeFieldDefinition, or how to author custom runtime fields. The schema section (schema/types.json and schema/statuses.json) is documented, but schema/fields.json is the most powerful customization primitive (adds typed flags to create/update/list) and is completely undocumented.

- CONFIGURATION.md adds a 'Custom Runtime Fields' section covering:
- schema/fields.json file path and shape ({ "fields": [RuntimeFieldDefinition...] })
- All RuntimeFieldDefinition properties with examples
- One end-to-end example (add a 'component' string field on Task items)
- Note on unknown_field_policy for governance
- Note that pm schema add-field (once implemented) is the preferred CLI method
- COMMANDS.md schema section cross-references custom fields
